src: ⚡ Write Native with TypeScript ✨ Best of all worlds (TypeScript, Swift, Objective C, Kotlin, Java, Dart). Use what you love ❤️ Angular, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue with: iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), Android (View, Jetpack Compose), Flutter and you name it compatible.
ja: ⚡ TypeScript でネイティブを記述 ✨ あらゆるいいとこ取り（TypeScript, Swift, Objective-C, Kotlin, Java, Dart）。好きなものを使おう ❤️ Angular, React, Solid, Svelte, Vue と iOS（UIKit, SwiftUI）、Android（View, Jetpack Compose）、Flutter などに対応
